# Qobuzarr 0.0.15 (2025-10-11)

## Highlights
- Fix CS1737 by reordering `TrackDownloadService` constructor (required before optional).
- Stabilize test runs: stop watch-loop churn by generating `plugin.json` only on Pack/Publish.
- New CI: fast suite on PRs; manual full/full-live workflows.

## Changes
### Fixed
- Constructor parameter order in `TrackDownloadService` (CS1737).
- Restored `QobuzDownloadClient.cs` known-good to fix broken string literals.
- Resolved `QobuzSubscriptionTier` ambiguity; cache `.Find(...)` usage.
- Unified logging via `IQobuzLogger` (`NLogAdapter`).
- Safe file checks with `_diskProvider`/`FileInfo` instead of missing helpers.

### Changed
- `IStreamUrlProvider.TryGetStreamUrlAsync` uses `IReadOnlyList<int>` for quality chains.
- Generate `plugin.json` only on Pack/Publish to avoid watch loops.

### Docs
- tests/README explains fast vs full vs live; avoid `dotnet watch test`.

### CI
- `.github/workflows/ci-tests.yml` for fast PR tests; manual `full`/`full-live`.

## Upgrade Notes
- Target remains .NET 6 for plugin compatibility; plan migration to .NET 8 in a future release.
- If you depend on old `IStreamUrlProvider` signatures, update to `IReadOnlyList<int>`.
